articles.title: Attractive valuations emerging, but oil prices hold the key: Aman Chowhan
articles.description: Indian equities are experiencing a sharp correction due to geopolitical tensions, with valuations becoming attractive. However, elevated oil prices and conflict duration pose significant risks, potentially impacting trade deficits and currencies. Investors are advised to focus on reasonably valued stocks, with engineering, EPC, and IT midcaps showing promise.

articles.title: Bose Krishnamachari quit Kochi Biennale following sexual harassment allegation, says foundation
articles.description: KBF chairperson V. Venu says the complaint triggered an internal investigation, though no police report has been filed

articles.title: Shock as dozens of bodies, mostly infants, discovered in Kenya mass grave
articles.description: Some of the 32 bodies, including 25 children, are believed to have come from local hospitals and mortuaries.

topStories.title: West Asia War: Sharif briefs Saudi Crown Prince MBS as Pakistan pushes to mediate US-Iran talks
topStories.description: In a bid to mediate rising tensions in the Middle East, Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif briefed Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman on diplomatic efforts aimed at fostering dialogue between the US and Iran. As conflict escalates, can Pakistan play a pivotal role in restoring peace?

dailyNews.title: Congress gets notice to vacate 24 Akbar Road office completely by March 28: Report
dailyNews.description: The Congress party has been ordered to vacate its long-standing headquarters at 24 Akbar Road by March 28, marking the end of an era. This follows the relocation of its national office to Indira Bhawan, a move rooted in its historical journey since 1978.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day: Tom Hanks on resilience — ‘This too shall pass’
dailyNews.description: Tom Hanks embodies a steady presence in Hollywood, emphasizing the temporary nature of both success and failure. His wisdom encourages resilience and a grounded perspective, which is vital in high-pressure environments, reminding us that emotional extremes will pass.

dailyNews.title: Iran claims US, Israel hit Bushehr nuclear plant— What's the strategic importance of the facility? | Explained
dailyNews.description: Iran war: The IAEA reported no damage from a projectile strike at Bushehr nuclear plant, which operates at low capacity yet is crucial to Iran's energy supply.

dailyNews.title: Republicans Step Up Efforts to Reach DHS Funding Deal and End Shutdown
dailyNews.description: A day after President Trump said he did not want a compromise, Senate Republicans sent Democrats a plan that would break off ICE enforcement funding and reopen the rest of the department.

dailyNews.title: Trump Picks ‘Alpha Male’ Influencer to Be Tourism Envoy
dailyNews.description: Nick Adams, known for his crass humor and internet trolling, was previously nominated to be the ambassador to Malaysia. But his nomination was pulled earlier this year.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Seems Open to Trump Request to Block Asylum Seekers at Border
dailyNews.description: A policy of turning back many asylum seekers at the border was rescinded in 2021, but the Justice Department wants the flexibility to reinstate it as a tool for border control.

dailyNews.title: President Trump to deploy more than 1,000 additional troops
dailyNews.description: Sources tell NBC News that President Trump will send more than an additional 1,000 soldiers from the 82nd Airborne to the Middle East. NBC News’ Chief Foreign Correspondent Richard Engel reports.

dailyNews.title: Democrat flips Republican-held Florida state House district that includes Trump’s Mar-a-Lago
dailyNews.description: Democrat Emily Gregory won a special election Tuesday for the Florida state House district that includes President Donald Trump’s Mar-a-Lago resort, flipping the seat from Republican control, The Associated Press projects

dailyNews.title: Senate Republicans optimistic about potential deal to fund TSA
dailyNews.description: There’s a potential deal in the works to re-open the Department of Homeland Security, according to four sources familiar with the negotiations between Congress and the White House. NBC News’ Tom Costello reports.

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin sworn in to serve as Homeland Security Secretary
dailyNews.description: President Trump held a swearing-in ceremony for the Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin at the White House. Mullin pledged to "fight every single day" to protect the homeland and commented on the ongoing partial government shutdown.

dailyNews.title: 'Oh, golly': Britain's embattled Starmer navigates Trump's Iran war ire
dailyNews.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer likely won't fire back insults at President Donald Trump, those close to him say.

dailyNews.title: Trump gets a daily video montage briefing about the Iran war
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — Each day since the start of the war in Iran, U.S. military officials compile a video update for President Donald Trump that shows video of the biggest, most successful strikes on Iranian targets over the previous 48 hours, three current U.S. officials and a former U.S. official said

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on with Pentagon expected to send more troops to Middle East
dailyNews.description: President Trump said several members of his administration were involved in talks with Iran about the ongoing war.

dailyNews.title: We asked every lawmaker in Congress what they're doing to end the DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers and President Trump appear to be edging closer to a framework to wrap up the Department of Homeland Security shutdown — but a breakthrough has remained out of reach. CBS News contacted every House and Senate office to ask what they're doing to end the shutdown.

dailyNews.title: 3/24: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump says Vance and Rubio are involved in talks with Iran; Senate inches toward a potential DHS funding solution.
